caption: A man with a bald head and grey beard, wearing a grey polo shirt and a red name tag, speaks while standing in front of a white presentation board. The board features the logo "ALPHASENZSOR" and a section titled "Typical Gas Sensor Attributes." To the left, another man in a light-blue button-down shirt and a blue name tag is partially visible, looking down. The first frame shows both men, with the speaker looking slightly to the side. In the following frames, the camera zooms in and centers on the man in the grey shirt. He maintains a serious expression and continues talking, his mouth moving as he speaks. The background remains a neutral office or conference setting with a white wall. Small images and text are visible on the board, including a section for "More information, please contact."
